MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: M. Sison; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Amish Patel is present.
Attorney, Michael C. Hall, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Marion Fisher, is present.
Attorney, Zoe Polk, representing the defendant through limited scope.
Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-20-2010 is vacated.
